object_text_inputs_long: center sector | Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical dark handles, reflective/smudged surface and minor dents; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away) and shown mostly full-height and centered in the crop.

left sector | Vertical rectangular brown wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim containing a colorful beach-themed print (blue sky, sea and a bird); glass-covered and intact, shown in a narrow edge-cropped vertical crop (top/bottom or sides partially cut off), likely wall-mounted and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

right sector | Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and low-sheen finish, vertical orientation; appears slightly edge-cropped on the left and photographed at close range (~0.8 m from camera).

center sector | Glossy dark red/brown wooden barstool-style chair with a round padded black leather seat, carved ornate backrest and turned legs with a circular footrest; slightly edge-cropped at the top/left and photographed close to the camera (about 1.0 m away).

center sector | Glossy dark red-brown carved wooden chair with ornate openwork backrest and vertical slats; seat area is partly visible with deep shadow and the top/sides are edge-cropped (partial) in the image — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

right sector | Partial, edge-cropped dining table/island with a light varnished wood live-edge rectangular tabletop and a dark brown paneled vertical base; a small potted plant sits on the surface and an electrical outlet is visible on the base side; smooth/varnished finish, chairs are partially visible at the left; appears close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m away).

center sector | Close-up partial view of a dark brown painted wooden raised-panel two-door cabinet with a central vertical seam, visible wood grain and slightly worn/scuffed finish; the image is edge-cropped and the cabinet appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

right sector | Dark brown wooden tall cabinet with vertical recessed-panel doors and a slim vertical metal handle; the unit appears flush against the wall and is partially cut off at the right edge of the crop (approx. 1.5 m from camera).

right sector | Dark stained wooden base kitchen cabinet with recessed paneled doors and a glossy finish, lower front shows a small chip/tear and the left side is edge-cropped by the image; countertop overhang is visible above — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

left sector | Wall-mounted round clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands set in a dark glossy scalloped (wavy) frame; shown at an oblique angle and slightly edge-cropped, estimated ~1.5 m from camera.

right sector | Partial, edge-cropped glossy black coffee maker with a rounded front, reflective chrome ring at the top and a small blue-lit rectangular panel on the front; appears to be a compact countertop single-cup unit made of glossy plastic and metal, photographed from close range (≈0.5 m).

center sector | Partial dark brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion and carved vertical backrest slats; front and lower portions are edge-cropped in the image and the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

right sector | Partial edge-cropped brown wooden cabinet front showing vertical recessed panels and a lighter wood or laminate top edge with glossy varnish and visible grain; appears close to camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

right sector | Partial view of a dark mahogany/brown wooden cabinet front with a glossy, slightly reflective finish and simple rectangular face panels; lower portion is visible and cut off by the image edge, appearing about 1–2 meters from the camera.

right sector | Partial view of a compact stainless-steel and black-plastic drip coffee maker with a visible glass carafe and handle on the warmer plate; front-right of the unit is cut off by the image edge, metallic surfaces show reflections, and no illuminated indicators are visible — estimated distance ≈ 1.0 m from the camera.

right sector | Varnished dark-brown wooden cabinet door filling most of the crop, with a recessed rectangular center panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish showing subtle reflections; small metallic knob or reflective spot near the lower center is visible; appears intact and was likely photographed from roughly 1.0 m.

right sector | White plastic rectangular wall outlet faceplate, vertical orientation, right edge partially cropped; two faint circular socket openings visible and surface shows light smudges or pale green marks, image is low-resolution and slightly blurred — estimated ~0.5 m from camera.

right sector | Dark brown wooden cabinet/closet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular center panel; the upper portion is partially cut off by an overhead lamp and the crop is edge-cropped, slightly low-resolution/blurred, with no visible hardware and appears tall and close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

right sector | Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden cabinet panel with glossy finish and visible vertical grain/panel lines; a lighter wooden baseboard or trim is visible at the bottom of the crop; dim lighting and slight surface reflections suggest the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

attribute.image_summary: Forward-facing view of a narrow interior hallway/doorway. A white six-panel door is centered and closed, set within decorative white trim. A narrower white closet/secondary door sits recessed to the left inside the same opening. On the left wall there is a thermostat above a double light-switch plate; on the right wall a single switch and a partially visible dark circular wall decoration appear near the upper right. Beige textured walls and wood threshold at the base of the door are visible. Scene is uncluttered and shows typical interior trim and hardware details useful for matching this node view.

attribute.additional_notes: Photo taken from a hallway node facing a textured beige wall. Key landmarks: vertically hanging US flag centered on wall, white dual light switches to its right, and an open doorway to a bedroom with a dark headboard visible. Damaged/peeled plaster is present along the doorway jamb.
attribute.image_summary: A hallway interior shot of a textured beige wall. Centered on the wall is a vertical American flag suspended from a small hook. To the right of the flag is a white dual rocker light switch plate. At the far right edge of the frame is an open doorway with decorative white molding leading to a bedroom; part of a dark wood headboard and bedding are visible inside. The doorway jamb shows peeling/torn plaster. Lighting appears primarily from natural sources inside the adjacent room, and overall scene clutter is minimal.

attribute.additional_notes: Camera viewpoint is close to the left textured wall (camera appears within ~0.5 m of it). Door hinge side is on the right (door swings inward toward right). Transom window glazing appears intentionally dark/covered. Right-side window provides most of the natural light.
attribute.image_summary: Interior entryway shot facing a white six-panel front door centered in the frame with a rectangular transom above. The camera is positioned near the left textured wall, which occupies the left third of the image. A window with white horizontal blinds sits on the right wall and provides natural daylight, producing highlights on the trim. White baseboard molding runs along the floor and door frame. The door's metal lever handle and deadbolt are visible at standard height. Overall the scene is low-clutter, traditional in style, with pale blue-gray painted walls and wood flooring at the bottom edge of the frame.

attribute.image_summary: Image primarily shows a close-up of a textured light-gray interior wall filling most of the frame to the right and center. attribute.additional_notes: Narrow entry alcove with recessed arched-top window; thermostat mounted on right wall; matching white trim and baseboards; photographed from approximately 1.6 m camera height.
attribute.image_summary: Image shows a narrow entryway or small hallway wall with a centered rectangular window topped by an arched fabric valance and covered by closed white horizontal blinds. A white-painted window sill and trim frame the window. To the left edge is a white paneled interior door with visible hinges; the right edge shows another door/frame and knob. A wall-mounted white thermostat/control is positioned on the right wall about mid-height. Walls are textured and painted a light gray-green; natural daylight is entering through the window (blinds closed). The scene is minimally furnished and uncluttered.

attribute.additional_notes: Image shows heavy compression/artifacting; appears to be interior view looking out through blinds to a balcony and neighboring building. Use blinds and window frame lines for matching.
attribute.image_summary: Interior-facing photograph centered on a white horizontal slatted blind covering a large glass window. Behind the blinds is a balcony railing and, beyond that, a multi-level building facade with balconies. A vertical light-colored column is visible at the right edge. Scene is strongly backlit by diffuse daylight; image contains compression artifacts and low visual fidelity. Primary spatial layout: camera near interior, blinds immediately in front (~0.5 m), window glass just behind (~0.8 m), small balcony/railing at ~3 m, distant building facade at ~6 m.

attribute.image_summary: Image shows a close view of white paneled double closet doors centered-left in frame with metal lever handles. Lighting appears to be natural from the adjacent room; overall scene is low-clutter and residential in a traditional style.

attribute.image_summary: Image shows a large expanse of textured light-gray wall occupying the left and center of the frame. On the extreme right is a dark wood dresser or nightstand against the wall. On its top sits a large beige/orange mottled fabric object (pillow or bag) that is heavily pixelated and partially crops out of the frame. A black cable runs down the side of the dresser. Above and behind the dresser and pillow, a small vertical framed piece and a dark rectangular screen (monitor/TV) are visible near the upper-right corner. attribute.additional_notes: Narrow walk-in closet interior; single continuous wire shelf and rod mounted near ceiling; photo taken from doorway looking inward. Useful matching cues: teal garment cluster center-back, dense colorful right-side hanging row, dark suitcase on floor back-right.
attribute.image_summary: Interior view of a small walk-in closet taken from the doorway. The left foreground shows the partially open white door. The back wall has a high metal wire shelf running across and turning to the right, with folded clothes and items on top and hangers beneath. A dense row of colorful shirts occupies the right third of the frame, hanging from the rod. A small cluster of teal and white garments hangs center-back under the shelf. A dark suitcase or trunk sits on the floor beneath the right-side clothing with a folded stack of linens on top. Walls are beige/gray with white baseboard and hardwood flooring. Scene suggests medium clutter and active clothing storage.
